data.raceComments: {"comment":"This looks the most winnable race 7. WONDERDOWNUNDER has contested and when you consider he's never finished further back than fourth and has the two runs at 1600m under the belt, he deserves to be considered the testing material. 11. SHARE THE STARS has been similarly consistent this time in, but she gets to 1600m for the first time and that's looked a trip she'd be adept at in this grade at least. 9. ENCHANTED LASS has a tough gate to contend with, but was a marked improver second-up and now looks ready for 1600m. Bit of a gap to the rest and maybe 13. CRISTARIA could be the pick of them, mainly because she's better suited up to this trip second-up and has a gun draw.","runners":[7,11,9,13],"exclusive":false}
